title: ApiEndPoints.js — paymentsCheckout path segment versioned (/v2/)
commit_message: fix: bump checkout API path to v2

why_endpoints_only.explanation: Only ApiEndPoints.js changes. CRITICAL = all describes that list ApiEndPoints.js in sources[] (endpoints.payment ×3, endpoints.favourites ×2). ApiConstants.js is untouched — HIGH pulls in ApiConstants describes from the same feature file as defensive siblings (scenario 5 pattern).
why_endpoints_only.key_point: 5 CRITICAL + 2 HIGH = 7 selected; 70 SKIP — tight feature isolation comparable to scenario 5 without touching constants.

tests.test: endpoints.payment > addCard points to the correct payment creation path
tests.result: ⚠️  MAY FAIL — if test hardcodes full URL without v2 on sibling paths only

tests.test: endpoints.payment > getAllCards points to the cards listing path
endpoints.payment > paymentsCheckout points to the checkout path
tests.result: ⚠️  WILL FAIL — assertion expects pre-v2 string

tests.test: endpoints.favourites > addCardtoFavourite endpoint points to sports favourites add path
endpoints.favourites > advertisement endpoint builder produces a correctly interpolated URL

HIGH.reason: Same suite file (api-navigation.feature.test.js) — ApiConstants describes; sources = ApiConstants.js (unchanged) but file has a CRITICAL hit

tests.test: ApiConstants > MAX_IMAGE_UPLOAD_SIZE equals 10 MB expressed in bytes
ApiConstants > TIMEOUT equals 30 seconds expressed in milliseconds

SKIP.reason: ApiEndPoints.js does not appear in sources[] for standalone, cross-dependent, or other feature files

coverage_gaps.detail: Update expected checkout path substring to include /v2/ where the product now routes.
